title: The Paid Prospecting Stack Is Lying to You (And You're Paying Hundreds a Month for the Privilege)
subtitle: I built my own outbound tool from scratch using open, live data. Here is exactly why, and what I gave up to do it.
meta_description: Why I stopped paying for Apollo and ZoomInfo and built my own B2B prospecting tool from scratch using live, open data at zero running cost.
primary_keyword: B2B prospecting tool build vs buy
